Describe the sequence of preparatory actions the man performs before engaging with the cable machine.
canonical_answer: At 0s, the bald man wearing a dark sleeveless shirt adjusts a black belt around his waist; at 6s, the man touches his left wrist area while standing near the cable machine; at 10s, the man crosses his arms over his chest briefly; at 18s, the man holds a handle attached to the silver cable machine.

question: Detail the specific body movements and positioning changes the man exhibits throughout the video clip.
canonical_answer: At 2s, the bald man manipulates the belt near his waist; at 8s, the man faces slightly towards the left of the camera; at 10s, the man uncrosses his arms after holding them over his chest; at 16s, the man's right hand is raised near his chest; at 18s, the man grips the cable machine handle.
